description:
A command line interface for the Nitrokey FIDO2, Nitrokey Start, Nitrokey 3 and NetHSM.


This release fixes the nethsm set-cluster-ca-certificate command and adds the --san/--no-san options for nethsm csr.
What's Changed
- nethsm: Add --san and --no-san options for csr by @robin-nitrokey in #754
- Update dependencies and release v0.12.2 by @robin-nitrokey in #753
Full Changelog: v0.12.1...v0.12.2
